title: Tangy American Avocado Tacos
description: A salty and snappy weeknight American dish featuring avocado, this recipe is perfect for a quick dinner, and its ingredients are ayurvedic-rajasic-friendly, meaning they promote energy and vitality.
instructions: Bring a large pot of salted water to a boil and blanch the tortillas for 30 seconds to make them more pliable.
Cut the avocados in half and remove the pit, then slice them into thin pieces.
In a large bowl, whisk together the lime juice, salt, and pepper.
Add the sliced avocado to the bowl and toss to coat with the lime juice mixture.
Heat a large skillet over medium-high heat and warm the tortillas for 30 seconds on each side.
Assemble the tacos by spooning the avocado mixture onto a tortilla and topping with red onion, cilantro, and feta cheese.
Garnish with additional cilantro and lime wedges if desired.
Store any leftovers in an airtight container in the refrigerator for up to 24 hours.
